accommodations.text: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: additional wait time for verbal responses

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on classroom assessments.
Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.
accommodations.source_quote: personal FM/DM listening system in every class

accommodations.text: Accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting.
accommodations.source_quote: accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy 30 minutes twice weekly
Specialized academic instruction executive functioning 50 minutes twice weekly

goals.text: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.
goals.baseline: Completes in-class assignments in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities

goals.text: Oscar will maintain a topic across three conversational turns in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Maintains a topic for one turn in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: maintain a topic across three conversational turns

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline

goals.text: Ethan will arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days.
goals.baseline: Arrives with required materials in 3 of 10 class days.
goals.source_quote: arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days

goals.text: Oscar will use a checklist to organize materials for each class in 8 of 10 days.
goals.source_quote: use a checklist to organize materials for each class
